title: EDTA and its Salts Group - Canada.ca
content:
## EDTA and its Salts Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- EDTA and its Salts Group
- Summary of publications
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
EDTA and its Salts Group
Ethylene diaminetetraacetic acid (EDTA) or edetic acid
Glycine, N,N′-1,2-ethanediylbis[N-(carboxymethyl)-
None planned at this time
Glycine, N,N′-1,2-ethanediylbis[N-(carboxymethyl)-, tetrasodiumsalt
Ferric monosodium EDTA
Ferrate(1-), [[N,N′-1,2-ethanediylbis[N-(carboxymethyl)glycinato]](4-)-N,N′,O,O′,ON,ON′]-, sodium,(OC-6-21)-
Ferric ammonium EDTA
Ferrate(1-), [[N,N′-1,2-ethanediylbis[N-(carboxymethyl)glycinato]](4-)-N,N′,O,O′,ON,ON′]-, ammonium,(OC-6-21)-
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 152, No. 18 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment.  The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette, Part I: Vol. 151, No. 17 .
